expectations.text: Names a primary metric tied to the goal (CAC or ROAS)
expectations.evidence: Primary metric section names CAC (and ROAS), judged against LTV with a 3:1 target.

expectations.text: Includes leading indicators (CTR, CPC, conversion rate)
expectations.evidence: Leading-indicator funnel lists CTR, CPC, landing conversion rate, CPA.
Formulas given: CTR = clicks/impressions, CPC = spend/clicks, conv = conversions/clicks, CAC = spend/paying customers.

expectations.text: Warns against vanity metrics such as impressions
expectations.evidence: Watch-outs: 'Don't optimize vanity metrics — impressions, reach, raw clicks feel like progress but don't pay rent.'
'Attribution is imperfect — no model assigns credit perfectly... treat reported ROAS as directional; sanity-check against blended CAC and a holdout/geo test.'
